name: Gift of the Depths
entries: You can breathe underwater, and you gain a {@variantrule Swim Speed|XPHB} equal to your {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}.
You can also cast {@spell Water Breathing|XPHB} once without expending a spell slot. You regain the ability to cast it in this way again when you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.
